checks.description: After a rising edge of clk, the register q must update to the previous value shifted right by one bit with the new most‑significant bit equal to the driven value of d.
checks.pass_condition: q_next == {d, q_current[7:1]} where q_current is the value of q before the rising edge and q_next is the value after the edge.
checks.trigger_condition: When a rising edge of clk occurs while d is driven.

checks.description: Validate that after one clock cycle the most‑significant bit of q reflects the value presented on d and all other bits have shifted right by one position.
checks.pass_condition: q[7] == d after the rising edge and for i in 0..6, q[i] == q_prev[i+1] where q_prev is the value before the edge.
checks.trigger_condition: When a rising edge of clk occurs with a known value on d.
